name: Ubiquiti UniFi Dream Machine Pro
title: Ubiquiti UniFi Dream Machine Pro
title_extended: Ubiquiti UniFi Dream Machine Pro – Enterprise Gateway with UniFi OS
short_description: Quad ARM Cortex-A57 Core 1.7 GHz, 4 GB DDR4, IDS/IPS Throughput: 3.5 Gbps, 10G SFP+ WAN, 10G SFP+ LAN
description: Enterprise-grade UniFi OS Console with 1.7 GHz quad-core processor, 4GB RAM, built-in security gateway, 10G SFP+ support, 8-port Gigabit switch, and network video recorder with 3.5" HDD bay. All-in-one networking console that runs every UniFi OS application.

detailed_description.heading: The Best Experience for Large Networks
detailed_description.text: The Dream Machine Pro (UDM Pro) is an enterprise-grade UniFi OS Console that offers a scalable networking experience and comprehensive platform for multi-application use. UDM Pro is 1U-sized, rack-mountable console, and it is powered by a fast, 1.7 GHz quad-core processor. UniFi Dream Machine PRO is a multifunctional server designed to manage any UniFi equipment within the wireless networks and video surveillance devices of the series. In addition to management functions, the model also combines the capabilities of a switch and router USG, making the UDM-PRO ideal for deploying complex projects that include devices from different lines of UniFi.

detailed_description.heading: UniFi Enterprise Architecture Evolves with UniFi OS
detailed_description.text: The new UniFi OS portal provides streamlined access to all of your UniFi OS consoles and applications. UDM Pro can also run the UniFi Protect application for convenient monitoring and complete management of your camera surveillance system. The UDM Pro is an all-in-one networking console that runs every UniFi OS application, like Network and Protect.

detailed_description.heading: Seamless Network Integration
detailed_description.text: Use the UniFi Dream Machine Pro as your network appliance. It features a built-in security gateway, 10G SFP+ WAN support, an 8-port Gigabit switch, and network video recorder that supports compatible 3.5" hard disk drives (HDDs). For traffic processing in UDM-PRO is responsible for a quad-core processor, built on ARM Cortex-A57 with a frequency of 1.7 GHz. The amount of RAM is 4 gigabytes of DDR 4, which allows the model to effectively cope with the task of traffic routing and network management.
